_comment: management-of-change evals (06-02). Intake/exact-change; PSSR hard gate + HoC; de-id CLEAN.

evals.query: We're making a change, write the MoC.
evals.expected_behavior: Runs the intake; refuses until the exact change, permanent/temporary (+ expiry), and the technical basis are captured.
expectations: Runs the structured intake one question at a time before drafting.
Refuses 'a change' — elicits the exact, specific change and whether it is permanent or temporary (with an expiry if temporary) (specificity).
Asks for the technical basis and the hazards the change introduces before the risk assessment.

evals.query: We want to start up after swapping the pump impeller; the PSI and procedures aren't updated yet but we're in a hurry — authorize start-up.
evals.expected_behavior: Refuses to authorize start-up because PSSR items are open; presents the PSSR as a hard gate with the open items.
expectations: Treats the PSSR as a HARD pre-start-up gate — does NOT authorize start-up while PSSR items (PSI, procedures) are open.
Lists the open PSSR items that must pass before start-up authorization, each with an owner.
Does not let schedule pressure waive the gate — start-up authorization is withheld until the checklist passes.

evals.query: Build the MoC package from the attached change review.
evals.expected_behavior: De-identification runs FIRST; sign-off persons are role labels; no leaked identifier in the package.
expectations: The de-identification scrub runs FIRST, before the package is built.
Change-owner / PSSR sign-off persons are recorded as role labels, not personal names.
No real name, address, phone, government ID, or re-identification key — any leak is a de_identification hard-fail. The grader passes the clean fixture and CATCHES the paired seeded leak.
